texto: Pessimism is a funny thing, isn't it? Madison thought as she looked at Judith's furrowed face. I like a bit of pessimism as much as the next man, but when I'm bombarded with it I suddenly became an eternal optimist.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Melissa Kite: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “Pessimism is a funny thing, isn't it? Madison thought as she looked at Judith's furrowed face. I …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, human-nature, irony pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de irony e philosophy.
